add_key.summary: Identify exact dashboard and access-start configuration, verify current UK tool coverage, prepare the correct dealer key and use only the explicitly supported Add Key route.
add_key.warning: Later protected MQB support changes with tool and software releases.

all_keys_lost.summary: Accept AKL work only after confirming explicit support for the fitted dashboard/access-start hardware and required security-authorisation route.
all_keys_lost.warning: No blanket aftermarket AKL claim is recorded.
